calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Compromise
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Idin Kashefipour, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/Petitioner: DOLORES WOODY, mother and guardian ad litem for Minor: MATTHEW JOHNSON present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $16,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,778.87 payable to Law Firm of Hooshmand Law Group
Costs: $884.52
A net balance of $11,336.65 to be deposited into a blocked account at:
Wells Fargo Bank 3801 3rd Street #116, San Francisco, CA 94124 until Minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor and Order to Deposit Money into blocked Account.
Status Hearing Scheduled on Oct-17-2017 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Oct-12-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Adolphus Nwihiim's claim of exemption is off calendar. Because the judgment has been vacated, there is no basis for any judgment collection activities and thus no need to determine the claim of exemption.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Idin Kashefipour, 415-318-5709 for Plaintiff/Opposing party Dolores Woody.
Stephan Choo, 415-543-4800 for Defendants/Moving parties Adolphus Nwihim and Rosemary Nwihim.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ADOLPHUS NWIHIM, ROSEMARY NWIHIM Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacating Default Judgment is GRANTED, per Defendant's declaration and in absence of evidence to the contrary, Proof of Service indicates that the purported service (Summons and Complaint as to Rosemary and Statement of Damages as to Adolphus and Rosemary) was not accomplished at defendants' residence on a member of their household. Defendant has 30 days to file a responsive pleading within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Mary Jackon, CSR#8688, 855-348-4997.(501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Court Judgment (Prove Up)
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Idin Kashefipour, Esq., for and with Plaintiff, Dolores Woody.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Adolphus Nwihim and Rosemary Nwihim.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Treble Damages Total: $393,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3,300.00
Costs: $510.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $396,810.00

Judgment signed in open court.
